summary: Agent infrastructure signals this cycle: MCP servers, memory systems, evals, sandboxing, and multi-agent orchestration tools. Microsoft Agent Framework, RAG memory projects, and security-focused red-teaming stand out.

candidates.title: Microsoft Agent Framework
candidates.why_it_matters: Official Microsoft multi-agent orchestration and deployment framework.

candidates.title: agent-observability-mcp npm package
candidates.why_it_matters: MCP server agent observability with cost tracking & audit trails.

candidates.title: CocoonStack sandbox MicroVMs for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Fast cold-boot MicroVM sandbox for secure agent execution.

candidates.title: nmem-cli 0.10.18 – CLI/TUI for Nowledge Mem memory
candidates.why_it_matters: CLI memory management tool for AI agents.

candidates.title: klappy/bee-ai-auth-mcp – self-host OAuth MCP server
candidates.why_it_matters: Self-hosted OAuth MCP server for secure agent conversations.

candidates.title: shiyongyin/agent-eval-lite – lightweight agent eval
candidates.why_it_matters: Lightweight local framework for AI agent evaluation.

candidates.title: ionalpha/flynn – self-hosted agent OS in Go
candidates.why_it_matters: Single-binary agent OS with sandboxed, governed actions.

candidates.title: zycaskevin/Vault-Agent-Memory – local memory governance
candidates.why_it_matters: Local-first shared, auditable agent memory via SQLite+MCP.

candidates.title: AgentEvalHQ/AgentEval – .NET evaluation toolkit
candidates.why_it_matters: Comprehensive .NET eval toolkit for tool usage & RAG metrics.

candidates.title: bitfun/GCWing BitFun – desktop agent runtime with memory & evolution
candidates.why_it_matters: Desktop-grade agent runtime with code agent, cowork, memory & evolution.

candidates.title: edobusy/agenthold – shared versioned MCP server for multi-agent
candidates.why_it_matters: MCP server for shared versioned state in multi-agent workflows.

candidates.title: yv1ing/Z3r0 – AI red-team workbench
candidates.why_it_matters: AI-native red-team workbench with sandboxed tooling & evidence.
